key.query: official Jura 12 year old single malt Scotch whisky

emittedEvidence.query: official Jura 12 year old single malt Scotch whisky
emittedEvidence.summary:
**Official bottle identified:** **Jura 12 Year Old** single malt Scotch whisky from the **Isle of Jura Distillery**. The official Jura product page confirms it is a **12-year-old** expression and says it is **matured in American white oak ex-bourbon casks**. ([jurawhisky.com](https://www.jurawhisky.com/us/all-whisky/signature-series/12-year-old/?utm_source=openai))

An independent non-retailer source, Whisky Advocate, identifies the current standard bottling as **Jura 12 year old, 40% ABV**, and adds that it is **finished in oloroso sherry casks**. ([whiskyadvocate.com](https://whiskyadvocate.

results.title: https://www.jurawhisky.com/us/all-whisky/signature-series/12-year-old/
results.description:

An independent non-retailer source, Whisky Advocate, identifies the current standard bottling as **Jura 12 year old, 40% ABV**, and adds that it is **finished in oloroso sherry casks**. ([whiskyadvocate.com](https://whiskyadvocate.

**Official bottle identified:** **Jura 12 Year Old** single malt Scotch whisky from the **Isle of Jura Distillery**. The official Jura product page confirms it is a **12-year-old** expression and says it is **matured in American white oak ex-bourbon casks**. ([jurawhisky.com](https://www.jurawhisky.com/us/all-whisky/signature-series/12-year-old/?utm_source=openai))

An independent non-retailer source, Whisky Advocate, identifies the current standard bottling as **Jura 12 year old, 40% ABV**, and adds that it is **finished in oloroso sherry casks**. ([whiskyadvocate.com](https://whiskyadvocate.
